# FrenzyCars

> FrenzyCars is an independent automotive media publication delivering expert car reviews, breaking auto news, maintenance guides, and in-depth features on electric vehicles, car insurance, and car culture. Tagline: "The pulse of performance."

FrenzyCars covers the full spectrum of automotive content for enthusiasts and everyday drivers alike. Editorial tone is direct, opinionated, and performance-focused. All reviews include a numerical rating out of 10.

## Reviews

- [2025 Porsche 911 GT3 RS Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/porsche-911-gt3-rs/): Track-focused 911 variant, rated 9.6/10
- [2024 McLaren 750S Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/mclaren-750s/): British supercar with V8, rated 9.4/10
- [Ferrari 296 GTB Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/ferrari-296-gtb/): Plug-in hybrid Ferrari sports car
- [Lotus Emira Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/lotus-emira/): Last combustion Lotus, V6 and manual
- [Porsche Taycan Turbo S Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/porsche-taycan-turbo-s/): Benchmark electric sports sedan
- [BMW M5 Touring Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/bmw-m5-touring/): Hybrid performance estate
- [Toyota GR Corolla Review](https://frenzycars.com/reviews/toyota-gr-corolla/): Hot hatch with rally DNA

## News

- [Ford Mustang GTD Nürburgring](https://frenzycars.com/news/ford-mustang-gtd-nurburgring/): Track record attempt coverage
- [Porsche 718 Goes Electric](https://frenzycars.com/news/porsche-718-electric/): Full EV transition confirmed
- [Rimac Nevera Reverse Record](https://frenzycars.com/news/rimac-nevera-reverse-record/): World record in reverse
- [Lucid Air Sapphire Record](https://frenzycars.com/news/lucid-air-sapphire-record/): Production EV performance benchmark
- [Mercedes-AMG GT 63 S E Performance](https://frenzycars.com/news/mercedes-amg-gt-63s-eperformance/): Plug-in hybrid AMG GT
- [Hyundai Ioniq 5 N Award](https://frenzycars.com/news/hyundai-ioniq-5n-award/): World Car of the Year recognition
- [Kia EV9 World Car](https://frenzycars.com/news/kia-ev9-world-car/): Three-row electric SUV award
- [Audi RS6 Avant GT](https://frenzycars.com/news/audi-rs6-avant-gt/): Limited edition performance wagon

## Guides & Features

- [Best Hot Hatches 2026](https://frenzycars.com/guides/best-hot-hatches-2026/): Ranked buying guide
- [EV Range Anxiety: The Myth](https://frenzycars.com/electric/ev-range-anxiety-myth/): Data-driven long read debunking range fears
- [How Long Do EV Batteries Last](https://frenzycars.com/electric/how-long-do-ev-batteries-last/): Battery longevity data and real-world analysis
- [Death of the Manual](https://frenzycars.com/culture/death-of-the-manual/): Editorial on the decline of manual transmissions
- [The Last Great Estates](https://frenzycars.com/culture/last-great-estates/): Cultural piece on performance wagons

## Maintenance & How-To

- [How Long Does It Take to Wrap a Car](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/how-long-does-it-take-to-wrap-a-car/): Professional wrap timelines explained
- [How Much Does It Cost to Wrap a Car](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/how-much-does-it-cost-to-wrap-a-car/): Full cost breakdown by vehicle type
- [How Long Does a Car Wrap Last](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/how-long-does-a-car-wrap-last/): Lifespan and durability guide
- [Oil in Spark Plug Well](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/oil-in-spark-plug-well/): Diagnosis and fix
- [Car Won't Start – Lights Come On Clicking](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/car-wont-start-lights-come-on-clicking/): Troubleshooting guide
- [Check Engine Light Blinking Car Shaking](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/check-engine-light-blinking-car-shaking/): Causes and fixes
- [Grinding Noise When Braking](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/grinding-noise-when-braking/): Brake diagnosis guide
- [Why Is My Car Shaking at Idle](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/why-is-my-car-shaking-at-idle/): Idle vibration causes
- [Transmission Slipping Quick Fix](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/transmission-slipping-quick-fix/): DIY diagnosis steps
- [How to Fix AC Blowing Hot Air](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/how-to-fix-ac-blowing-hot-air/): Air conditioning repair guide
- [Level 2 EV Charger Installation Cost](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/level-2-ev-charger-installation-cost/): Home charging cost guide

## Insurance & Finance

- [Best Car Loans for Students](https://frenzycars.com/insurance/best-car-loans-for-students/): Financing options for first-time buyers
- [Is GAP Insurance Worth It](https://frenzycars.com/maintenance/is-gap-insurance-worth-it/): When GAP coverage makes sense
